mapper.update: UPDATE t_student SET student_name = #{studentName},department_id = #{departmentId} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.student_id,s.student_name,d.department_id,d.department_name FROM t_student s JOIN t_department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id
SELECT s.student_id,s.student_name,d.department_id,d.department_name FROM t_student s JOIN t_department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id WHERE s.student_id = #{id}
